$comment: OS0 first task (saas-orun-secrets): the orun-secrets DECLARATION consumed by the orun-secrets-tests component. Secret values never become content (the orun-secrets invariant) — this file carries only the typed secret:// reference per environment, its scope, and its consumer. The OGPIC_ORUN_SMOKE key is provisioned in orun-cloud with a SEPARATE value per environment (dev/stage/prod) via `orun secrets set --env <env>`, injected at run time by the orun runner; verify/local lanes use the ORUN_SECRET_<KEY> fallback. This file must never contain a value.

secrets.description: Smoke reference (dev value) proving the orun-secrets write+consume path end to end.
Smoke reference (stage value) — distinct from dev and prod.
Smoke reference (prod value) — distinct from dev and stage.
